steps.title: Use a point on the circle
steps.content: A radius is the distance from the center to any point on the circle. Use center $(24,7)$ and the $y$-intercept $(0,-11)$.

steps.title: Apply the distance formula
steps.content:
Compute the distance between those two points.
$$r=\sqrt{(24-0)^2+(7-(-11))^2}$$
$$r=\sqrt{24^2+18^2}$$
